new_cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised by material change
new_cascade_issues.description: Marble is significantly less dense and structurally weaker than the original material, leading to potential failure under launch loads.

new_cascade_issues.title: Shock test required due to material change
new_cascade_issues.description: The new material may not withstand the shock loads specified in the launcher SRS ICD, necessitating a retest.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal performance degradation due to material change
new_cascade_issues.description: Marble has different thermal properties, potentially increasing the ΔT across orbital cycles and violating the temperature stability requirement.

new_cascade_issues.title: Increased power consumption due to material change
new_cascade_issues.description: The thermal properties of marble may require additional heaters or cooling systems, increasing the average power consumption.
